channel.title: Big-Tech on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Big-Tech on Archive 03

item.title: $700 Billion in AI CAPEX: Madness or a Historic Infrastructure Cycle?
item.description: Amazon $200B, Alphabet $180B, Meta $125B… Big Tech’s AI capital expenditure is exploding toward a combined $700 billion in 2026. We analyze whether this is a repeat of the dot-com bubble or the largest infrastructure cycle since the cloud.

item.title: S&P 500 Hits All-Time High: What Does It Mean?
item.description: The S&P 500 has soared past 6,100 to a new record. Kurumi cheers for the dual engines of AI-driven earnings and easing geopolitical risks, while Mikael warns of Dot-com bubble valuations and ‘Extreme Greed.’ Is it time to hit the accelerator, or should you be looking for the emergency exit?
